records.ety: [L. vindicatio a laying claim, defense, vindication. See Vindicate.]

defs: The act of vindicating, or the state of being vindicated; defense; justification against denial or censure; as, the vindication of opinions; his vindication is complete.
quotes: Occasion for the vindication of this passage in my book.

defs: The claiming a thing as one's own; the asserting of a right or title in, or to, a thing.
